title: obione caput-medusae
intro: Obione caput-medusae, also known as sea rocket or horned poppy, is a biennial plant species in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its distinctive, horn-like projections on its seed pods. The medicinal properties of Obione caput-medusae include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve coughs, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of using Obione caput-medusae include its ability to ease digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a valuable herb for treating various ailments. Obione caput-medusae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support respiratory health and soothe the digestive system.
